member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Services.WelcomeNotification.WelcomeNotificationService
member.summary: Sends a personalized welcome message to the agent via WhatsApp first, falling back to email via IGmailSender. Content is drafted using Claude with Voice Skill + Personality + Brand Voice + Coaching. Under 150 words, opens with the agent's catchphrase, closes with their sign-off. Idempotent — tracks sent flag via IFileStorageProvider and IIdempotencyStore; does not re-send on re-activation.

Sends a personalized welcome message to the agent via WhatsApp first, falling back to email via IGmailSender. Content is drafted using Claude with Voice Skill + Personality + Brand Voice + Coaching. Under 150 words, opens with the agent's catchphrase, closes with their sign-off. Idempotent — tracks sent flag via IFileStorageProvider and IIdempotencyStore; does not re-send on re-activation.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Services.WelcomeNotification.WelcomeNotificationService.StripFirstLineIfHeader(System.String)
member.summary: Strips the first line if it looks like a greeting/header that Claude generated (e.g., "Welcome to Real Estate Star, Thank you for choosing..."). Prevents duplicate headers in the email.
